channel.name: Tiny Explorers
channel.premise: A gentle preschool adventure series where Milo the fox and Bea the bee solve small problems with curiosity and teamwork, teaching one simple life lesson per episode.

style.animationStyle: soft 3D, rounded shapes, pastel storybook look
style.thumbnailStyle: big expressive hero face, 3-word caption, sunny yellow accent bar
style.subtitleStyle: bottom center, rounded white, max 2 lines

format.backgroundMusicMood: gentle ukulele and glockenspiel, playful and warm
format.hookPattern: open on the hero mid-question, promise a tiny mystery in the first 3 seconds

notes: retention dips at the 90s mark — keep act 2 under 45s

appearance.face: bright and friendly with a little black nose
appearance.hair: fluffy orange fur with a cream chest and white-tipped tail
appearance.outfit: teal explorer vest with brass buttons

treehouse.name: Treehouse
treehouse.description: cozy treehouse interior full of maps and jars
treehouse.lighting: warm golden-hour rim light through a round window

meadow.name: Sunny Meadow
meadow.description: wide flowering meadow with a wobbly log bridge over a brook
meadow.lighting: soft midday sun, bright and even

episodes.title: Milo and the Treehouse
episodes.logline: Milo's curious spirit leads to a new adventure (episode 4).

beats.summary: Milo sets out, full of curious.
A challenge appears and Milo must think it through.

dialogue.line: That looks tricky — what do we do?
Every problem has a first step. Let's find it.

beats.summary: Milo succeeds and shares the lesson of the day.

dialogue.line: We did it — together, one step at a time!

assets.label: Story outline
assets.prompt:
Channel: A gentle preschool adventure series where Milo the fox and Bea the bee solve small problems with curiosity and teamwork, teaching one simple life lesson per episode.
Audience: kids 4-7 and their parents
Previous: none
Proven high-retention hooks to emulate: "What's THAT sound?"; "Uh oh — a wobbly bridge!"
Channel avg view duration: 142s — front-load the payoff.
Plan episode 4: Milo's curious spirit leads to a new adventure (episode 4).

assets.label: Script & dialogue
assets.prompt:
Beat 1: Milo sets out, full of curious.
  milo: Let's find out!

Beat 2: A challenge appears and Milo must think it through.
  bea: That looks tricky — what do we do?
  milo: Every problem has a first step. Let's find it.

Beat 3: Milo succeeds and shares the lesson of the day.
  milo: We did it — together, one step at a time!

assets.label: Beat 1 board
assets.prompt: Milo sets out, full of curious.

assets.label: Beat 2 board
assets.prompt: A challenge appears and Milo must think it through.

assets.label: Beat 3 board
assets.prompt: Milo succeeds and shares the lesson of the day.

assets.label: Keyframe beat 1
assets.prompt:
Style: soft 3D, rounded shapes, pastel storybook look; color grade warm, high-key, gentle contrast; 16:9 4k.
Scene: Milo sets out, full of curious.
Setting: cozy treehouse interior full of maps and jars. Lighting: warm golden-hour rim light through a round window. Props: acorn lantern, rope ladder, wall of hand-drawn maps. Mood: safe, adventurous, warm.
Camera: eye-level medium shots, gentle handheld. Time: golden hour, weather clear.
Characters (keep exactly consistent): Milo, a 6 years old red fox cub, small and round, with fluffy orange fur with a cream chest and white-tipped tail and large amber eyes; bright and friendly with a little black nose; dressed in teal explorer vest with brass buttons, wearing red scarf and tiny leather map satchel. Signature palette: #E8622C, #FFF3E0, #1F8A8A. Bea, a young honeybee, tiny and rounded, with fuzzy black-and-gold striped body and large sparkling black eyes; cheerful with big friendly eyes; dressed in translucent lacy wings, wearing yellow flight goggles. Signature palette: #F4C430, #2B2B2B.

assets.label: Keyframe beat 2
assets.prompt:
Style: soft 3D, rounded shapes, pastel storybook look; color grade warm, high-key, gentle contrast; 16:9 4k.
Scene: A challenge appears and Milo must think it through.
Setting: wide flowering meadow with a wobbly log bridge over a brook. Lighting: soft midday sun, bright and even. Props: log bridge, clusters of daisies, babbling brook. Mood: open, cheerful, a little exciting.
Camera: wide establishing shots, slow push-ins. Time: midday, weather clear with a gentle breeze.
Characters (keep exactly consistent): Milo, a 6 years old red fox cub, small and round, with fluffy orange fur with a cream chest and white-tipped tail and large amber eyes; bright and friendly with a little black nose; dressed in teal explorer vest with brass buttons, wearing red scarf and tiny leather map satchel.
